---
title: "calluna_hydraulics_plot"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Calluna hydraulics plotting

```{r}
#| label: libraries
#| echo: false

library(ggplot2)
library(ggeffects)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
```

```{r}
#| label: import

data <- read.csv("clean_data/DURIN_clean_LygraFire_field_trait_2025.csv")
data$age_class <- factor(data$age_class, levels = c("PIO", "BUI", "MAT"))
```

```{r}
#| label: prep

data <- data |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  mutate(means_treatment = mean(Area)) |>
  ungroup() 

data <- data[order(-data$means_treatment),]
```

### Plotting

```{r}
#| label: plot




ggplot(data, 
       aes(x = age_class, 
           y = 1, color = nin_type, size = means_treatment, label = round(means_treatment))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 2, position = position_dodge(0.1)) + scale_size_area(max_size = 30) + geom_text(size = 4, position = position_dodge(1)) + theme_minimal() + scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  labs(x = "Age class", color = "NiN type") + guides(size = "none") + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}
#| label: xylem area variation

variation_data <- data |>
  group_by(subset_id) |>
  mutate(subset_means = mean(Area)) |>
  distinct(subset_id, .keep_all = TRUE) 

variation_data$subset_damage <- as.character(as.numeric(variation_data$subset_damage))


xylem_variation_plot <- ggplot(data = variation_data, aes(x = age_class, y = subset_means)) + geom_point(color = "deepskyblue4", position = position_jitter(0.1)) + geom_violin(fill = NA, color = "deepskyblue4") + facet_grid(rows = vars(nin_type)) + labs(x = "Age class", y = "Mean xylem vessel area per subset in µm²") 
xylem_variation_plot
ggsave("plots/xylem_vessel_area_variation.png", xylem_variation_plot)

variation_data <- variation_data |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  mutate(min_max = max(subset_means)-min(subset_means))
```

### Xylem vessel area

```{r}
#| label: mixed effect model

#removing double xylem as they will bias the size estimate. then fitting a model with estimates of mean xylem vessel area for each treatment combo

data_model <- data |>
  filter(double_xylem == 0) # remove double xylem from xylem vessel size estimates

model <- lmer(Area ~ age_class * nin_type +  circ + subset_damage + (1 | plant), data = data_model)

pred_mod <- ggpredict(model, terms = c("age_class", "nin_type"))
```

```{r}
#| label: mixed effect model

#removing double xylem as they will bias the size estimate. then fitting a model with estimates of mean xylem vessel area for each treatment combo

data_model <- data |>
  filter(double_xylem == 0) # remove double xylem from xylem vessel size estimates

model <- lmer(Area ~ age_class * nin_type +  circ + subset_damage + (1 | plant), data = data_model)

pred_mod <- ggpredict(model, terms = c("age_class", "nin_type"))

pred_mod
plot(pred_mod)
```

```{r}
summary(model)
```

```{r}
res <- residuals(model)
plot(res)
```

```{r}
qqnorm(res)
qqline(res)
```

```{r}
#| label: mixed effect model prediction and raw values


mixed_vs_raw <- ggplot() +  geom_point(data = data, aes(x = age_class, y = means_treatment, color = nin_type), shape = 1, size = 3, position = position_dodge(0.2)) + geom_point(data = pred_mod, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group), shape = 2, size = 4, position = position_dodge(0.2)) + geom_errorbar(data = pred_mod, aes(x = x, ymin = predicted-std.error, ymax = predicted+std.error, color = group), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.2)) + labs(x = "Age class", y = "Mean xylem vessel area in µm²") + guides(color = guide_legend("NiN Type")) + scale_color_manual(values = c("darkslategrey", "deepskyblue4", "lightskyblue")) 
mixed_vs_raw

ggsave("plots/Mixed_effects_vs_raw_averages.png", mixed_vs_raw)

```

```{r}
anova(model, type = 3) #using type 3 as the drop1 output deemed the age_class:nin_type interaction significant
```

```{r}
#| label: post hoc age class and nin type

#post hoc for age_class:nin_type interaction
age_nin_emm <- emmeans(model, ~ nin_type * age_class, pbkrtest.limit = 13484) #contrast will be done in the next step, as emmeans recommend it.

contrast(age_nin_emm)
```

```{r}
#| label: post hoc nin type

#post hoc for nin_type
nin_emm <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ nin_type, pbkrtest.limit = 13484) #contrast will be done in the next step, as emmeans recommend it.

contrast(nin_emm)
```

```{r}
xylem_variation <- pred_mod |>
  group_by(x) |>
  mutate(variation = max(predicted)-min(predicted))
```

### Density plots

```{r}
#| label: creating density data
#| warning: false

#creating a new dataset with the density of xylem, keeping only distinct values of density
density_data <- data |>
  group_by(subset_id) |>
  summarise(
            source_file = source_file,
            age_class = age_class,
            nin_type = nin_type,
            plant = plant,
            subset_total = sum(Area),
            subset_area = subset_area,
            circ = mean(circ), #using the mean circularity for the subset, otherwise it will pick the first value
            subset_damage = subset_damage
            ) |>
  mutate(density = subset_total/subset_area) |>
  mutate(replicate = substr(source_file, 7,7))

#keeping only distinct values of density, filtering by subset_id as there is only one density per subset
density_data <- distinct(density_data, subset_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: density model

density_model <- lmer(density ~ age_class * nin_type + circ + subset_damage + (1 | plant), data = density_data)
summary(density_model)
```

```{r}
#| label: qqplot density

res_density <- residuals(density_model)
qqnorm(res_density)
qqline(res_density)
```

```{r}
#| label: plot density residuals
plot(res_density)
```

```{r}
#create predictions for the density model, make it ready for use in ggplot
pred_density <- ggpredict(density_model, terms = c("age_class", "nin_type"))

#this is just to output the values from each group
pred_density

#ggplot for plotting the predicted values for density and all of the subset data outlined in violin plots
pred_density_plot <- ggplot(data = pred_density) + 
  #geom_point(data = density_data_summarised, aes(x = age_class, y = density, color = nin_type), alpha = 0.5, position = position_dodge2(0.4)) + 
  geom_violin(data = density_data, aes(x = age_class, y = density, color = nin_type), fill = NA) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group), position = position_dodge(0.9), size = 4) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = x, ymax = predicted+std.error, ymin = predicted-std.error, color = group, width = 0), position = position_dodge(0.9)) + 
  labs(x = "Age class", y = "Density (Total xylem area / subset area") + 
  guides(color = guide_legend("NiN type")) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("darkslategrey", "deepskyblue4", "lightskyblue"))

pred_density_plot
ggsave( "plots/pred_density_plot.png", pred_density_plot)
```

```{r}
anova(density_model, type = 3)
```

```{r}
#| label: post hoc density

density_age_nin_emm <- emmeans(density_model, ~ age_class*nin_type, pbkrtest.limit = 13755)

contrast(density_age_nin_emm)
```
